mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, account, password_hash, nickname, avatar, gender, birth, `status`
mapper.insert: insert into tb_user (create_time, update_time, account, password_hash, nickname, avatar, gender, birth, `status`) values (#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passwordHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{birth,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT})

insert into tb_user
create_time,
update_time,
account,
password_hash,
nickname,
avatar,
gender,
birth,
`status`,

#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

mapper.update:
update tb_user
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
account = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password_hash = #{passwordHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT},
birth = #{birth,jdbcType=DATE},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_user set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, account = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password_hash = #{passwordHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, birth = #{birth,jdbcType=DATE}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_user (create_time, update_time, account, password_hash, nickname, avatar, gender, birth, `status`) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.passwordHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.birth,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.status,jdbcType=TINYINT} )

insert into tb_user (create_time, update_time, account, password_hash, nickname, avatar, gender, birth, `status`) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.passwordHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.birth,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.status,jdbcType=TINYINT} )
on duplicate key update create_time=values(create_time), update_time=values(update_time), account=values(account), password_hash=values(password_hash), nickname=values(nickname), avatar=values(avatar), gender=values(gender), birth=values(birth), `status`=values(`status`)

delete from tb_user where id in
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update.foreach:
update tb_user
create_time = #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
account = #{item.account,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password_hash = #{item.passwordHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nickname = #{item.nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avatar = #{item.avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{item.gender,jdbcType=TINYINT},
birth = #{item.birth,jdbcType=DATE},
`status` = #{item.status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
where id = #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
